parameters.jsCode:
const body = items[0].json.body || items[0].json || {};
return [{ json: { mode: 'new_lead', lead_id: body.lead_id, campaign_id: body.campaign_id, event: body.event || 'new_lead' } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT
  l.*,
  c.name AS campaign_name,
  c.brief AS campaign_brief,
  c.product_type,
  c.target_audience,
  c.revenue_target,
  c.currency,
  c.is_staging,
  c.environment
FROM leads l
JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = l.campaign_id
WHERE l.id = $1::uuid
  AND l.status NOT IN ('won', 'lost');

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES ('sales_crm', 'skip_lead', 'lead', $1::uuid, $2::jsonb, 'skipped');

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Mode: New Lead').item.json.lead_id, JSON.stringify({ reason: 'Lead missing, won, or lost' }) ] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, skipped: true, reason: 'Lead not actionable' } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ locationId: $env.GHL_LOCATION_ID, firstName: ($json.lead.name || 'Lead').split(' ')[0], lastName: ($json.lead.name || '').split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') || undefined, email: $json.lead.contact_email || undefined, phone: $json.lead.contact_phone || undefined, source: $json.is_staging ? 'cts_staging' : 'content_to_sales_agent', tags: [ $json.is_staging ? 'env:staging' : 'env:production', 'campaign:' + $json.lead.campaign_id, 'temp:' + ($json.lead.temperature || 'warm') ] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE leads SET ghl_contact_id = COALESCE($2, ghl_contact_id) WHERE id = $1::uuid RETURNING id, ghl_contact_id;

-- First-touch: only approved template #1 in sequence. NEVER freestyle sales copy.
SELECT mt.*
FROM message_templates mt
WHERE mt.sequence_key = COALESCE($1, 'default_sales')
  AND mt.status = 'approved'
  AND mt.sequence_order = 1
ORDER BY mt.version DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, blocked: true, reason: $('Render Template (No Freelance)').item.json.reason } }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE leads SET
  status = 'contacted',
  temperature = CASE WHEN temperature = 'cold' THEN 'warm' ELSE temperature END,
  last_touch_at = now(),
  follow_up_step = GREATEST(follow_up_step, $2),
  next_follow_up_at = now() + ($3 || ' days')::interval,
  available_for_requeue = false,
  notes = COALESCE(notes,'') || E'\n[' || now()::text || '] first_touch template=' || $4 || CASE WHEN $5 THEN ' (staging dry-run)' ELSE '' END
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

INSERT INTO sales_activities (
  lead_id, activity_type, channel, notes, outcome,
  template_key, template_version, rendered_body, payload
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid, 'outreach', $6, $7, $8,
  $4, $9, $10, $11::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES (
  'sales_crm',
  CASE WHEN $5 THEN 'first_touch_dry_run' ELSE 'first_touch' END,
  'lead',
  $1::uuid,
  $11::jsonb,
  'success'
);

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $json.lead_id,
  $json.sequence_order,
  String($json.days_after_prev || 2),
  $json.template_key,
  $json.dry_run,
  $json.channel === 'ghl_automation' ? 'ghl_automation' : ($json.channel || 'whatsapp'),
  ($json.dry_run ? '[STAGING DRY-RUN] ' : '') + 'template=' + $json.template_key,
  $json.dry_run ? 'dry_run' : 'sent',
  $json.template_version,
  $json.rendered_body,
  JSON.stringify({ template_key: $json.template_key, dry_run: $json.dry_run, ghl_contact_id: $json.ghl_contact_id, channel: $json.channel })
] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, lead_id: $('Render Template (No Freelance)').item.json.lead_id, template_key: $('Render Template (No Freelance)').item.json.template_key, dry_run: $('Render Template (No Freelance)').item.json.dry_run, ghl_contact_id: $('Render Template (No Freelance)').item.json.ghl_contact_id } }}

parameters.query:
-- Follow-up cadence + temperature classification
-- no response after N days → cold; meeting booked activities → qualified handled separately
WITH due AS (
  SELECT l.*, c.name AS campaign_name, c.is_staging, c.environment
  FROM leads l
  JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = l.campaign_id
  WHERE l.status IN ('new', 'contacted', 'qualified')
    AND (l.next_follow_up_at IS NULL OR l.next_follow_up_at <= now())
    AND l.available_for_requeue = false
  ORDER BY l.next_follow_up_at NULLS FIRST
  LIMIT 50
),
classified AS (
  SELECT d.*,
    CASE
      WHEN d.last_inbound_at IS NOT NULL AND d.last_inbound_at > coalesce(d.last_touch_at, d.created_at) THEN 'warm'
      WHEN coalesce(d.last_touch_at, d.created_at) < now() - interval '5 days' THEN 'cold'
      ELSE coalesce(d.temperature, 'warm')
    END AS new_temperature,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - coalesce(d.last_touch_at, d.created_at))::int AS computed_no_response_days
  FROM due d
)
SELECT * FROM classified;

SELECT mt.*
FROM message_templates mt
WHERE mt.sequence_key = COALESCE($1, 'default_sales')
  AND mt.status = 'approved'
  AND mt.sequence_order = $2
ORDER BY mt.version DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- Non-buyers are NEVER lost without a path back
UPDATE leads SET
  status = 'nurture',
  temperature = $2,
  available_for_requeue = true,
  next_follow_up_at = NULL,
  no_response_days = $3,
  last_touch_at = now(),
  notes = COALESCE(notes,'') || E'\n[' || now()::text || '] nurture_requeue: ' || $4
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

INSERT INTO sales_activities (lead_id, activity_type, channel, notes, outcome, payload)
VALUES ($1::uuid, 'nurture_requeue', 'system', $4, 'nurture', $5::jsonb);

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES ('sales_crm', 'nurture_requeue', 'lead', $1::uuid, $5::jsonb, 'success');

UPDATE leads SET
  status = 'contacted',
  temperature = $2,
  no_response_days = $3,
  last_touch_at = now(),
  follow_up_step = $4,
  next_follow_up_at = now() + ($5 || ' days')::interval
WHERE id = $1::uuid;

INSERT INTO sales_activities (
  lead_id, activity_type, channel, notes, outcome,
  template_key, template_version, rendered_body, payload
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid, 'follow_up', $6,
  CASE WHEN $7 THEN '[STAGING DRY-RUN] ' ELSE '' END || 'template=' || $8,
  CASE WHEN $7 THEN 'dry_run' ELSE 'sent' END,
  $8, $9, $10, $11::jsonb
);

INSERT INTO agent_actions_log (agent_name, action_type, entity_type, entity_id, payload, result)
VALUES ('sales_crm', CASE WHEN $7 THEN 'follow_up_dry_run' ELSE 'follow_up' END, 'lead', $1::uuid, $11::jsonb, 'success');

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('week', now()) - interval '7 days' AS period_start,
         date_trunc('week', now()) AS period_end
),
campaign_stats AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS campaign_id,
    c.name,
    c.revenue_target,
    c.currency,
    c.environment,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'won') AS won_count,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'lost') AS lost_count,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'nurture') AS nurture_count,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE l.status IN ('new','contacted','qualified')) AS in_progress,
    coalesce(sum(l.revenue_amount) FILTER (WHERE l.status = 'won'), 0) AS revenue_won,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE l.available_for_requeue) AS requeue_pool
  FROM campaigns c
  LEFT JOIN leads l ON l.campaign_id = c.id
  GROUP BY c.id
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT period_start FROM bounds) AS period_start,
    (SELECT period_end FROM bounds) AS period_end,
    sum(won_count)::int AS won_count,
    sum(lost_count)::int AS lost_count,
    sum(nurture_count)::int AS nurture_count,
    sum(in_progress)::int AS in_progress,
    sum(revenue_won) AS revenue_won,
    sum(revenue_target) AS revenue_target,
    sum(requeue_pool)::int AS requeue_pool,
    jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'campaign_id', campaign_id,
      'name', name,
      'won', won_count,
      'lost', lost_count,
      'nurture', nurture_count,
      'in_progress', in_progress,
      'revenue_won', revenue_won,
      'revenue_target', revenue_target,
      'requeue_pool', requeue_pool,
      'environment', environment
    )) AS by_campaign
  FROM campaign_stats
)
INSERT INTO sales_reports (
  period_start, period_end, campaign_id,
  won_count, lost_count, nurture_count, in_progress,
  revenue_won, revenue_target, currency, report_json, delivered_to
)
SELECT
  period_start, period_end, NULL,
  won_count, lost_count, nurture_count, in_progress,
  revenue_won, revenue_target, 'USD',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'by_campaign', by_campaign,
    'requeue_pool', requeue_pool,
    'generated_at', now()
  ),
  '[]'::jsonb
FROM agg
RETURNING *;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'weekly_sales_report', report_id: $json.id, period_start: $json.period_start, period_end: $json.period_end, won: $json.won_count, lost: $json.lost_count, nurture: $json.nurture_count, in_progress: $json.in_progress, revenue_won: $json.revenue_won, revenue_target: $json.revenue_target, text: `Weekly sales: won=${$json.won_count} lost=${$json.lost_count} nurture=${$json.nurture_count} in_progress=${$json.in_progress} revenue=${$json.revenue_won}/${$json.revenue_target}` }) }}

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $json.id || $('Generate Weekly Report').item.json.id, JSON.stringify([{ channel: 'webhook', at: new Date().toISOString() }]), JSON.stringify({ report_id: $('Generate Weekly Report').item.json.id, won: $('Generate Weekly Report').item.json.won_count, revenue_won: $('Generate Weekly Report').item.json.revenue_won }) ] }}
